content.title: Muslims Day Ansar Update!
content.subtitle: Alhamdulillah! we now have 375 ansar
content.body:
🌿 Alhamdulillah! Muslims Day Ansar Has Now Reached 375 Supporters

Today is Jumu'ah—the blessed day when du'as are accepted, and a beautiful opportunity to invest in your Hereafter.

Just one month ago, we launched the Muslims Day Ansar initiative. Alhamdulillah, 375 brothers and sisters have already joined this da'wah mission as supporters.

May Allah ﷻ reward every one of them with the best in this world and the Hereafter. Ameen.

🎯 What is the mission of Muslims Day?

Our goal is not simply to operate an app.

Our vision is to build a platform that helps millions of Muslims grow closer to Allah every single day—encouraging them to recite the Qur'an, establish their salah, learn authentic du'as, and guide their families toward Islam.

Insha'Allah, over the next six months, we aim to reach 10 million app installs, so that even more people can benefit from authentic Islamic knowledge, righteous deeds, and spiritual growth.

🤝 Who are the Muslims Day Ansar?

A mission of this scale requires consistent financial support.

That is why, from among our many users, we are looking for 2,000 Ansar—people who will contribute BDT 500 per month to help sustain this ongoing da'wah effort.

They are not merely premium subscribers; they are partners in this mission of serving Islam.

📊 Our Next Milestone

To complete our caravan of 2,000 Ansar, we still need 1,625 more supporters.

Your participation can play a meaningful role in helping us deliver beneficial Islamic knowledge to 10 million Muslims.

Perhaps Allah will make you a means of bringing the light of Islam into the lives of countless people.

💎 What Do You Receive as an Ansar?

✅ The opportunity to share in the rewards of millions of righteous deeds

✅ Access to 7 Muslims Day Premium subscriptions

✅ 1 Mahfil Premium subscription

✅ FREE participation in exclusive online halaqahs, seminars, and special events

But above all, the greatest reward is becoming part of an ongoing mission dedicated to serving the Deen of Allah.

🌙 A Decision This Jumu'ah

Perhaps BDT 500 per month is not a significant amount for you—it may be what you spend on a single meal at a restaurant.

Yet this small monthly contribution could become a Sadaqah Jariyah whose rewards continue even after your death, Insha'Allah.

Today, on this blessed day of Jumu'ah, become a Muslims Day Ansar.

Insha'Allah, it may be one of the most beautiful investments you ever make for your Hereafter.

I want to become a Muslims Day Ansar! 👉 Click here: https://id.kahf.co/ansar/muslimsday
